positive: A stunning, symmetrical celestial map featuring interconnected cosmic fauna and constellations. Central composition dominated by a stylized, bioluminescent nebula forming the background. Silhouetted foreground elements include geometric crescent moons, stylized winged celestial beasts (harpy/griffin abstract forms), and intertwining roots of cosmic energy. The style should be high-contrast graphic art, reminiscent of detailed etched engravings combined with neon vaporwave accents. Deep ultramarine blues, violet, electric turquoise, and glowing gold accents. Perfect for a clean, print-on-apparel silhouette look. Clean lines, ornate detailing, mystical, fantasy.
negative: low quality, blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, disfigured, cartoon, messy, grainy
